output:
All four checks pass. Summary:

- Created `bob_tools/planfile/tests/test_parser_rejections.py` with two parameterized classes:
  - `TestStructuralCorruptionRejection` — exercises duplicate H1, multiple Bugs, and duplicate phase ordinals, asserting the user-facing error substring and 1-based source line for each.
  - `TestCompatModeToleratesMalformedTags` — pins compat-mode lenience for the five tag-level cases (unclosed bracket, missing colon, empty annotation value, AUTO without colon, AUTO with empty name) that the task listed as rejections but the parser currently treats as prose.
- Added a NOTES.md [2.7.1-2.7.2] entry documenting the gap: only three of the eight listed conditions raise in compat mode; the `[feat: ]` empty-value case is in fact accepted as a valid annotation; Stage 3 strict mode is the right home for the rest.
- 13 new tests; suite is 349 passed, ruff/format/mypy all clean.
